description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages lint, test, and report and global variables CHROME_DEBUG_URL and DOCROOT. In the lint stage add a Changelog job using the registry.gitlab.com/behat-chrome/docker-chrome-headless image that runs only on merge‑request events and executes `git fetch`, `FILES_CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DIFF_BASE_SHA...HEAD)`, a shell loop checking for CHANGELOG.md and exiting with warning messages if absent; add a GrumPHP job on the same image that runs `composer require --dev --prefer-dist --ansi --no-progress --sort-packages phpro/grumphp-shim ergebnis/composer-normalize enlightn/security-checker` followed by `vendor/bin/grumphp run -n`; and add a Makefile job on the same image with the same merge‑request rule that runs `make --dry-run test_make`. In the test stage define three jobs (PHP 8.1, PHP 8.2, PHP 8.3) that extend the .test_template, each using the corresponding registry.gitlab.com/behat-chrome/docker-chrome-headless:8.x image, start a zenika/alpine-chrome:latest service with remote‑debugging flags, run the before_script steps (`bin/wait-for-chrome.sh`, `php --version`, curl to Chrome, `composer install -o --prefer-dist --ansi --no-progress`, optional sed, copy phpunit.xml), then execute `vendor/bin/phpunit --colors=always --log-junit junit.xml` and always publish junit.xml as a JUnit artifact. Also in the test stage add a Renovate job using the renovate/renovate image that runs on schedule or manually on web, needs no previous jobs, sets RENOVATE_ENDPOINT, RENOVATE_GIT_AUTHOR, RENOVATE_PLATFORM, RENOVATE_TOKEN variables, and runs `renovate $RENOVATE_EXTRA_FLAGS`. In the report stage add a Report PHPUnit coverage job extending .test_template, using the docker‑chrome‑headless image, setting XDEBUG_MODE=coverage, running `vendor/bin/phpunit --colors=never --log-junit junit.xml --coverage-cobertura phpunit-coverage.xml --coverage-text`, and publishing both junit.xml and phpunit-coverage.xml as JUnit and Cobertura coverage artifacts. Finally, add a Validate Renovate config job in the lint stage with the renovate/renovate image, triggered on merge‑request events, that runs `renovate-config-validator $RENOVATE_EXTRA_FLAGS`.
